message:
Update CLI completion script with missing commands

Adds completions for:
- serve command with --config option
- search --limit option

Ensures shell completion scripts stay in sync with
available CLI commands and options.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,6 +36,7 @@ cli
 
 cli
   .command("search <query>", "Fuzzy search prompts")
+  .option("--limit <n>", "Max results (default: 10)")
   .option("--json", "Output JSON")
   .action(searchCommand);
